# Privacy Policy
Please refer to the [IBS ROeS homepage](https://www.ibs-roes.org) for the [IBS ROeS legal information](https://www.ibs-roes.org/roes_legalinformation_overview.html) and [IBS ROeS Data Privacy Statement](https://www.ibs-roes.org/roes_data_privacy_statement.html) (in German only).

This web page is [open-source](https://github.com/ROeS-2027/roes2027.github.io) and hosted on [Github Pages](https://pages.github.com/).  
The Github Privacy Policy can be found on the [Github site policy page](https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement). 
 

# Imprint

## Society information
IBS-ROeS. 
c/o Michael Vock. 
Institute of Mathematical Statistics and Actuarial Science. 
University of Bern. 
Alpeneggstrasse 22. 
3012 Bern, Switzerland. 

Email: [office@ibs-roes.org](mailto:office@ibs-roes.org)
Website: [https://www.ibs-roes.org](https://www.ibs-roes.org)

In Austria, ROeS is organized as a non-profit association under Austrian association law with its registered office in Innsbruck.

ZVR: 933331531
